name: Yanez, Carlos
evidence: Self-reported as a Deputy with Travis County Constables Pct 4; gave to George Morales, a Travis County constable candidate. Law-enforcement/county government worker.

name: Simmons, Robert
evidence: Recurring small donor in Manor/east Travis Co (78762) to Commissioner Jeff Travillion, 2022-2025. 'Robert Simmons' is too common and no occupation/employer is listed; cannot confirm a specific individual.

name: Haussmann, Michele
resolved_employer: Land Use Solutions, LLC (owner) — land-use/zoning consultant & registered lobbyist
evidence: Michele Haussmann owns Land Use Solutions LLC, a ~29-yr Central/South Texas land-development entitlement consultancy; registered City of Austin/San Antonio lobbyist and a director of the Real Estate Council of Austin. Distinctive name; gave to Commissioner Travillion.

name: Jobe, Van
evidence: Single 2023 gift to Commissioner Travillion from N. Austin (78728); active federal donor (76 FEC gifts) but no occupation/employer listed and no web match confirms who 'Van Jobe' is.

name: McRae, Pete
resolved_employer: Texas Dept. of Agriculture / Texas Farmers Union lobbyist (retired; d. Feb 2023)
evidence: Almost certainly Pete McRae, longtime Austin progressive/public servant — Texas Farmers Union lobbyist recruited by Jim Hightower to the Texas Dept. of Agriculture (Ann Richards-era network), later secured state courthouse-restoration funding; died Feb 11, 2023 (gift was 2021). Matches a Democratic Travillion donor. Note: a different 'Pete McRae' (Katy, TX, retired BP energy trader) is NOT this person.

name: Brockenbrough, Anne
evidence: Matches Anne Brockenbrough, who runs a working ranch outside Austin and writes (UT Michener Fellow); active in land conservation (2011 Brockenbrough Ranch conservation easement co-funded by Travis County). Strongly Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0) consistent with gift to Commissioner Travillion.

name: McSween, Derek
resolved_employer: HPM (Program Director) — capital-improvement / construction program management
evidence: Likely Derek McSween, HPM program director leading $700M+ Central Texas capital-improvement (K-12 facilities) programs; also tied to Austin (Austin Classical Guitar). Distinctive name; single 2021 gift to Commissioner Travillion.

name: Naiser, Marcus
resolved_employer: City of San Marcos, Asst. Director of Capital Improvements, P.E. (civil/water engineer)
evidence: Rare surname; matches Marcus Naiser, P.E., a Central Texas civil/water engineer (Texas A&M ag-engineering grad; prior TxDOT/State of Texas, LNV, Ardurra), now City of San Marcos capital-improvements official. Gave to Commissioner Ann Howard; no location in record so exact-person match not fully confirmed.

name: Davis, Griffin
resolved_employer: Victory Hearing & Balance Center, West Lake Hills (owner, Doctor of Audiology)
evidence: Griffin Davis, AuD, owns Victory Hearing & Balance Center at 3811 Bee Caves Rd, West Lake Hills 78746 — zip matches donor exactly. Very active Democratic donor (FEC lean 0.99, 138 gifts); gave to Commissioner Brigid Shea.

name: Streeter, Calvin
resolved_employer: UT Austin, Steve Hicks School of Social Work (professor — Meadows Foundation Centennial Professor)
evidence: Calvin L. Streeter, Ph.D., is a longtime UT Austin social-work professor (rural community development/program evaluation); lives in the Pflugerville area (78660 matches). Gave to Commissioner Ann Howard.

name: Adrian, Erle
resolved_employer: UT Health San Antonio, Dept. of Cell Systems & Anatomy — M.D./Ph.D. professor emeritus (retired)
evidence: Distinctive name matches Erle K. Adrian Jr., M.D., Ph.D., Professor Emeritus in Cell Systems & Anatomy (faculty 1969-2000); a retired medical academic. Donor lives downtown Austin (78701); prior faculty post was in San Antonio, so Austin retirement residency is plausible but not fully confirmed. Gave to Commissioner Brigid Shea.

name: Hailey, Royce
resolved_employer: DLA Piper LLP, Austin — attorney (real estate, energy & water, land use, development, government relations)
evidence: Matches Royce J. Hailey, Jr., a veteran Austin real-estate/land-use development attorney at DLA Piper (SMU 1965, licensed ~58 yrs). NW Austin resident (78731) consistent; gave to Commissioner Ann Howard. His practice touches 'energy & water' as counsel, but he is not an oil/gas executive/owner — no affiliation flag.
